textByHash.155b4496475b3b47d24817fefbb3e63303a37513: Protectors of the sacred water, ye alive in death,
textByHash.1a4f079274482f9197ba4a6c655ed1454e6d72ad: do not rest while this Vacu draws breath!
textByHash.1c5cf8760dc889a3d4d6a8fa87c45f5c72aecd93: I will teach thee a final lesson!
textByHash.1e253ad9154fd55e4046d41691bbd22aeb58c441: To be beaten by a mere mortal...
textByHash.22a2d2c7c5a76e1e4300411b39d46a9b54fafa62: Still thou seekst to challenge me?!
textByHash.3f9f691920908c6f9c5de809d31d76d6a6791a8c: Ha, ha, ha... feel my power!
textByHash.81260567a579cd7d5491909145cd9069485b175f: Ha ha ha... I shall return for thee when the time is right.
textByHash.a35f24c582075a0431239a88c375c8ae1da2ca85: Thy faith will help you little here.
textByHash.d5a301dbf4257780ca9ca634db6ee6f518d962c3: But I will leave thee with a taste of my power...
textByHash.e45f0d4f856bcc591b89c77c48fa2d72f5460896: Nezikchened: Ha ha ha ha ha!
textByHash.e7047d92fc7591b05d1accee22e0f0770b383a1e: And now thou seekst to defile my sanctuary...
